    Dark Mechanicum The Expiators Ferrifractor Cartel Flesh Eater Courts

Too Many Eyes

++ First transmitted: July 11, 2026, 00:00 ++


How many eyes is too many eyes?

However many eyes the thing had.

They blinked, they rolled, they winked.

Some bled, some wept, some blind.

Too many eyes.

Unfocused, wandering, wondering.

Too many eyes.

Focused now, many eyes are one eye.

They see me.

Too many eyes see through me.

They do not wander.

I dare not move or speak.

It speaks from a mouth that I cannot see.

It tells me that it sees me.

I cannot move or speak.

Something silver, something sharp, something quick.

Now I see, with too many eyes.

×

=][=
